summary: [APU Health Monitor] Create query for APU Health Monitor in Engine Folder

output_fields.name: psn
output_fields.description: Unique PSN associated with each APU Serial Number

output_fields.name: ref_date
output_fields.description: Reference Date - latest date only for each APU

transformations: Join rotables table with rotables_trend table on PSN field
Join result with aircraft table on aircraft registration to obtain aircraft type
For each APU (identified by PSN), select only the record with the latest ref_date
Retain trend_type value of CT5 only
acceptance_criteria: Query returns all APUs fitted to B737NG aircraft with their current CT5ATP health status
Each APU appears only once with its most recent reference date
All required fields are populated: APU P/n, APU S/n, PSN, Aircraft Reg., Reference Date, CT5 value, and Workorder if applicable
VDS is created in Engine Folder
Query is validated against AMOS Acceptance data before production cutover
When AMOS goes live to production, data source is switched to amos_postgres
